summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Food Court Revenue Management application. Backend APIs are working well (90.5% success rate), frontend authentication and navigation work correctly, but found critical issue with restaurant dialog component preventing restaurant creation through UI.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 403 instead of expected 401 for unauthorized access

ui_bugs.issue: Add Restaurant dialog does not open when button is clicked
ui_bugs.impact: Blocks restaurant creation through UI, preventing revenue entry workflow

integration_issues.issue: Cannot create restaurants through UI due to dialog issue, which blocks revenue entry since no restaurants are available

passed_tests: Backend user registration (admin and manager roles)
Backend user login with JWT authentication
Backend role-based access control (managers cannot create restaurants)
Backend restaurant CRUD operations via API
Frontend role-based UI display (admin sees restaurant management tab)
Frontend revenue form display (form loads correctly)
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix restaurant dialog component in RestaurantManager.js - the dialog does not open when 'Add Restaurant' button is clicked. This blocks the entire restaurant creation workflow and prevents users from adding restaurants, which in turn prevents revenue entry since no restaurants are available. The backend API for restaurant creation works correctly, so this is purely a frontend dialog/modal issue.
